figures.caption: Figure 4. Precision-Recall curves for MMD results on MMFakeBench and AMG (in-domain) and MiRAGeNews (OOD). Blue and green markers denote general-purpose MLLMs and task-specific detectors, respectively. Dashed gray lines indicate iso-F1 contours.
Table 1. Coarse-level MMD accuracy (%) and F1 across three benchmarks.

Figure 2. The Probabilistic Concept Graph Reasoning (PCGR) framework. PCGR organizes multimodal evidence into interpretable concept nodes and performs hierarchical probabilistic reasoning to infer claim veracity.
